category.scope_note: LED luminaire and light source compliance comparison for Chinese manufacturers exporting to the Rwandan market (RSB PVoC / S-Mark route).

title.en: China-to-Rwanda LED Luminaire Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国 LED 灯具进入卢旺达：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國 LED 燈具進入盧旺達：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China LED luminaire documentation against Rwanda Standards Board (RSB) requirements: mandatory Pre-Export Verification of Conformity (PVoC) with a Certificate of Conformity, the S-Mark / import inspection scheme, Rwanda Standards (RS) that adopt IEC 60598 / IEC 62560 / IEC 62471, the national energy-efficiency labelling programme, and RURA radio approval for connected lamps — compared against Chinese GB standards and CCC certification.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国 LED 灯具文件与卢旺达标准局（RSB）要求差距对照：强制性出口前符合性验证（PVoC）及符合性证书、S-Mark／进口检验机制、采用 IEC 60598／IEC 62560／IEC 62471 的卢旺达标准（RS）、国家能效标签计划，以及面向联网灯具的 RURA 无线电批准——并与中国 GB 标准及 CCC 认证对比。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國 LED 燈具文件與盧旺達標準局（RSB）要求差距對照：強制性出口前符合性驗證（PVoC）及符合性證書、S-Mark／進口檢驗機制、採用 IEC 60598／IEC 62560／IEC 62471 的盧旺達標準（RS）、國家能效標籤計劃，以及面向聯網燈具的 RURA 無線電批准——並與中國 GB 標準及 CCC 認證對比。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, conformity-assessment-body determination, product safety determination, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, and in-country importers should verify current Rwanda Standards Board (RSB) requirements, the applicable PVoC programme and route, RS / adopted IEC standard editions, energy-efficiency labelling rules, and RURA radio-type-approval obligations with qualified professionals and the appointed PVoC inspection body before shipment or import.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、合格评定机构认定、产品安全认定、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商及在卢进口商在出货或进口前，应与合格专业人士及指定 PVoC 检验机构核验现行卢旺达标准局（RSB）要求、适用的 PVoC 计划及路径、RS／所采用 IEC 标准版本、能效标签规则及 RURA 无线电型号核准义务。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、合格評定機構認定、產品安全認定、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商及在盧進口商在出貨或進口前，應與合格專業人士及指定 PVoC 檢驗機構核驗現行盧旺達標準局（RSB）要求、適用的 PVoC 計劃及路徑、RS／所採用 IEC 標準版本、能效標籤規則及 RURA 無線電型號核准義務。

answer_first.en: A Chinese LED luminaire manufacturer exporting to Rwanda must clear the Rwanda Standards Board (RSB) Pre-Export Verification of Conformity (PVoC) programme and obtain a Certificate of Conformity per consignment before the goods leave China, because regulated electrical products are inspected at import and must carry the S-Mark / pass RSB import inspection; product safety is assessed against Rwanda Standards (RS) that adopt IEC 60598 (luminaires) and IEC 62560 (self-ballasted LED lamps), photobiological safety against IEC 62471, and energy efficiency against the national energy-labelling programme; connected or radio-enabled lamps additionally need RURA radio approval. Existing Chinese CCC certification and GB / GB-T 7000 and GB 30255 evidence are not automatically accepted — RSB normally relies on IEC / ISO-based test reports (often from ILAC-accredited labs) through the PVoC route. Note Rwanda runs the grid at 230 V / 50 Hz (50 Hz matches China; nominal voltage differs from China's 220 V single-phase / 380 V three-phase), so voltage range and marking must be verified. Rwanda does NOT operate an EU-style horizontal RoHS / hazardous-substance regime for general electricals, so there is no direct local RoHS equivalent to declare against (state this plainly to the importer rather than implying one exists).
answer_first.zh: 向卢旺达出口的中国 LED 灯具制造商须在货物离开中国前通过卢旺达标准局（RSB）的出口前符合性验证（PVoC）计划并取得逐批的符合性证书，因为受管制的电气产品在进口环节接受检验，须加贴 S-Mark／通过 RSB 进口检验；产品安全依据采用 IEC 60598（灯具）及 IEC 62560（自镇流 LED 灯）的卢旺达标准（RS）评定，光生物安全依据 IEC 62471，能效依据国家能效标签计划评定；联网或带无线电功能的灯具还须取得 RURA 无线电批准。现有中国 CCC 认证及 GB／GB-T 7000、GB 30255 证据不会被自动接受——RSB 通常通过 PVoC 路径采用基于 IEC／ISO 的检测报告（多来自 ILAC 认可实验室）。注意卢旺达电网为 230 V／50 Hz（50 Hz 与中国相同；标称电压与中国 220 V 单相／380 V 三相不同），故须核验电压范围及标识。卢旺达对一般电气产品并未实行欧盟式的横向 RoHS／有害物质制度，故不存在可直接对照申报的本地 RoHS 等效要求（应向进口商如实说明，而非暗示其存在）。
answer_first.zht: 向盧旺達出口的中國 LED 燈具製造商須在貨物離開中國前通過盧旺達標準局（RSB）的出口前符合性驗證（PVoC）計劃並取得逐批的符合性證書，因為受管制的電氣產品在進口環節接受檢驗，須加貼 S-Mark／通過 RSB 進口檢驗；產品安全依據採用 IEC 60598（燈具）及 IEC 62560（自鎮流 LED 燈）的盧旺達標準（RS）評定，光生物安全依據 IEC 62471，能效依據國家能效標籤計劃評定；聯網或帶無線電功能的燈具還須取得 RURA 無線電批准。現有中國 CCC 認證及 GB／GB-T 7000、GB 30255 證據不會被自動接受——RSB 通常通過 PVoC 路徑採用基於 IEC／ISO 的檢測報告（多來自 ILAC 認可實驗室）。注意盧旺達電網為 230 V／50 Hz（50 Hz 與中國相同；標稱電壓與中國 220 V 單相／380 V 三相不同），故須核驗電壓範圍及標識。盧旺達對一般電氣產品並未實行歐盟式的橫向 RoHS／有害物質制度，故不存在可直接對照申報的本地 RoHS 等效要求（應向進口商如實說明，而非暗示其存在）。

editorial_controls.review_cycle: Re-verify each review cycle against current RSB PVoC programme scope, the appointed inspection body, adopted RS / IEC standard editions, and the national energy-labelling and RURA requirements.
editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, and verification flag before human_reviewed can be true. Where Rwanda has no horizontal hazardous-substance regime, the gap text must state the absence plainly rather than imply a local RoHS equivalent.
